name: Onion Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the diced onions and cook for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until softened but not browned.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, seasoning, and milk until well combined.
5. Gradually stir in the cooked onion mixture and all-purpose flour until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake for 20 - 25 minutes, or until puffed up and lightly browned.
The recipe remains accurate to the original instructions without any additions or alterations.
